title: Add /thinkback slash command to replay thinking blocks
description: CC ref: commands/thinkback/thinkback.tsx:40-59. CC loads the 'thinkback' plugin from the enabled-plugin list, finds its skill directory (skills/thinkback/), and plays a thinking-replay animation. If plugin not installed, offers marketplace install via enablePluginOp. OC: command entirely absent. Parent spec: #539.
